playbook.intent: From signed offer to first merged PR + first on-call shadow. New hire understands repo layout, runs the dev loop locally, has ship-ready CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md context, knows incident protocol, and has a named buddy. Output: 30/60/90-day plan filed, first PR merged, retro by day 14.
playbook.scope: From signed offer to first merged PR + first on-call shadow. New hire understands repo layout, runs the dev loop locally, has ship-ready CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md context, knows incident protocol, and has a named buddy. Output: 30/60/90-day plan filed, first PR merged, retro by day 14.

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Role Spec
stage.intent: Write the role and bar before the first interview.

tasks.task: Write the 1-page JD: outputs, stack, seniority, comp band
Define interview rubric and bar with hiring panel

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when panel signs off on rubric and bar.

stage.name: Source

tasks.task: Post in 2 channels + ask team for referrals
Screen for stack, seniority, and timezone fit

stage.decision-gate: Advance when at least 6 qualified candidates are in the loop.

stage.name: Interview Loop
stage.intent: Same loop for every candidate, scored independently.

tasks.task: Run the loop: take-home, system design, behavioral, peer
Scorecard within 24h per interviewer, no group debate first
Hold the calibration meeting after all scorecards in

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least 1 hire-bar candidate has cleared calibration.

stage.name: Offer & Sign
stage.intent: Move fast once the bar is cleared.

tasks.task: Sign and set the start date

stage.name: Onboard in 2 Weeks

tasks.task: Day 1-3: access, docs, intros, dev env
Week 1: first PR shipped (small but real)
Week 2: first end-to-end ticket shipped to prod

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a prod ticket shipped by end of week 2.
